note: seq=21 (PLACEHOLDER -- publish session local_713c255c: confirm last_seq+1 on the flat queue, renumber seq + this filename + the sha-note if the queue moved, assign next-free seq, sign, push). OUTCOME ROLLUP -- the review's item-1 IMPROVEMENT: feed real demo/reply/convert outcomes into MORE than the score. Reads atlas.outcome_stats (landed by seq-OUTCOME-INGEST) and writes atlas.outcome_rollup -- aggregated, Laplace-smoothed EV + a clamped [0.25..4.0] PRIORITY WEIGHT per (source / industry / platform / source_industry) -- plus status/<node>/outcome-rollup.json + a local /var/lib/atlas/rollup/outcome-rollup.json that the source promoter (source SELECTION), the enrich prioritizer (ENRICHMENT PRIORITY), and brain.frontier (IMPROVEMENT-ENGINE idea ranking) read to weight by MEASURED results. ADDITIVE + READ-MOSTLY: writes ONLY atlas.outcome_rollup (idempotent UPSERT) + status JSON; never ALTERs outcome_stats, never touches business/source_record, no destructive DDL. GRACEFUL: empty outcome_stats -> every weight ~1.0 (neutral) -> behavior identical to today (no fabrication; platform stays 'unknown' until the WP loop publishes platform). VERIFIED THIS SESSION (sandbox, no Postgres): py_compile clean; --selftest EXIT 0 with offline rollup math asserts (converting source out-weights dead source; weights clamped; lone bucket neutral 1.0); DB path WARN-not-fail only under ATLAS_SELFTEST_OFFLINE=1 (the box does NOT set the flag -> fail-loud there). VERIFY-ON-BOX: real outcome volume -> real weights. SHA-gated fetch + --migrate + --selftest gate before enabling the 15-min timer.

steps.note: seq=21: outcome rollup -- atlas.outcome_stats -> atlas.outcome_rollup + weights JSON for source-selection / enrich-priority / improvement-engine. Additive, neutral-on-empty.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_outcome_rollup.py':'77512eaa331e8aaaf7023477132b3df09d48db40c732b690ab2beab8f0c2b5c5'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outcome rollup (atlas.outcome_stats -> atlas.outcome_rollup; weights for source-selection / enrich-priority / improvement-engine)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_outcome_rollup.py
TimeoutStartSec=10min

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS outcome rollup -- recompute learned weights every 15 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=5min
OnUnitActiveSec=15min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-outcome-rollup.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
